title: Project Management Office Specialist (m/w/d)
required_skills: PMO support for digital transformation / change management projects
Coordination of cross-functional change and project managers
matched_skills: PMO operations & project governance (HSBC 6-workstream PMO — direct match for 'supporting project managers')
Digital transformation context (HSBC digital transformation programme — exact same setting)
Change management support & stakeholder alignment (HSBC transformation communications)
KPI reporting & dashboards (HSBC budget variance + C-suite reports)
Agile sprint methodology (Hapag-Lloyd scrum ceremonies, JIRA/Confluence)
Cross-functional coordination (national and international — HSBC multi-team interface)
missing_skills: German Arbeitssprache — B1+ may be below typical expectation for German corporate IT role
Gaming / entertainment industry knowledge — minor, domain-agnostic role
IT service delivery background — MERKUR is IT-focused (BEIT GmbH)
core_responsibilities: Support Change- und Projektmanager in gruppenweiten Digitalisierungsprojekten (national + international)
Project Management Office operations within the Digital Transformation Office
Drive innovation and digital change across MERKUR GROUP
recommended_emphasis: HSBC: PMO for digital transformation programme — exact match for 'Digitalisierungsprojekte' context
HSBC: supporting 6 workstream leads — directly mirrors 'supporting change and project managers'
Hapag-Lloyd: agile sprints, JIRA/Confluence — maps to IT-centric project tools
HSBC: KPI dashboards + variance reporting — PMO Specialist reporting deliverable

company_info.size_raw: MERKUR GROUP / BEIT GmbH — IT services for gaming/entertainment group
